$comment: Shared remote MCP tools for every agent on this repo (Claude Code, Cursor, and Replit — all REMOTE/http endpoints so the cloud Replit agent can reach them too). Tokens come from env vars, never committed. github = the cross-agent coordination bus (issues/PRs/reviews); context7 = current library docs. Verified live 2026-07-09: POST https://api.githubcopilot.com/mcp/ initialize returns tools/prompts/resources.
